---
title: "baseball_data_conversion"
format: html
---


```{r}
pitch_data_25 <- sabRmetrics::download_baseballsavant(
  start_date = "2025-03-01",

  end_date = "2025-04-01",
  game_type = "R"

)


pitch_data_25 <- pitch_data_25 |>
  sabRmetrics::get_quadratic_coef(source = "baseballsavant") |>
  sabRmetrics::get_trackman_metrics()



write_csv(pitch_data_25, "pitches.csv")

pitcher_names <- sabRmetrics::download_player(year = 2025, level = "MLB")


write_csv(pitcher_names, "pitcher_ids.csv")
```


```{r}



write_csv(pitch_data_25, "pitches.csv")

```
